engaged_works.title: Adventures of Ideas
engaged_works.ascription_notes: Routed from the 2026-05-10 Tier-1 publication backlog as an on-disk source witness.
engaged_works.summary: This on-disk text is being wired into the Source tab as a citation witness for Alfred North Whitehead, Adventures of Ideas. core_thesis: Alfred North Whitehead is included here as a process-philosophy comparator. Process and Reality presents a "philosophy of organism" in which actual entities, also called actual occasions, are the final real things; they are drops of experience, complex and interdependent, with relatedness prior to isolated quality ([Process and Reality, Preface](cite://whitehead/processrealityes0000unse/Preface); [Process and Reality I.II.I](cite://whitehead/processrealityes0000unse/Part-I-Ch-II-Sec-I)). Its categoreal scheme treats creativity, many, and one as ultimate notions: the many become one and are increased by one, so actuality is a process of concrescence rather than an enduring substrate ([Process and Reality I.II.II](cite://whitehead/processrealityes0000unse/Part-I-Ch-II-Sec-II)). In the later chapter on process, Whitehead distinguishes concrescence from transition: each actual occasion becomes a determinate unity and then serves as datum for new occasions ([Process and Reality II.X.II](cite://whitehead/processrealityes0000unse/Part-II-Ch-X-Sec-II)). Adventures of Ideas restates the vocabulary of prehension, concrescence, and creativity, and develops a value theory in which beauty is harmony among prehensions and civilized life requires truth, beauty, adventure, art, and peace ([Adventures, Philosophic Method XV-XVI](cite://whitehead/adventures-of-ideas/Philosophic-Method-XV-XVI); [Adventures, Beauty I](cite://whitehead/adventures-of-ideas/Beauty-I); [Adventures, Adventure](cite://whitehead/adventures-of-ideas/Adventure)).

cross_engagements.brief: Abhinavagupta presses the same substrate structure axis in the metaphysical register, but with the value `one-self-standing` rather than `process-field-with-no-enduring-substrate`.
Adi Sankara presses the same manifestation status axis in the metaphysical register, but with the value `sublatable-not-null` rather than `dependent-real`.
Gaudapada (Sankhya commentator) presses the same temporal mode axis in the metaphysical register, but with the value `substance-primary` rather than `process-primary`.
G. W. F. Hegel presses the same evolution register axis in the historical-genealogical register, but with the value `sublative-becoming` rather than `durational-creative-growth`.
Akalanka presses the same soteric end axis in the soteriological register, but with the value `isolation-or-discriminative-release` rather than `not-soteriological`.
Baladeva Vidyabhushana presses the same causation model axis in the metaphysical register, but with the value `unchanged-ground-with-changing-power` rather than `processual-concrescence`.
